seasonal_promos.valentines: Couples Massage Special — Valentine's weekend booking
seasonal_promos.summer: Summer Recovery — Sports massage for active clients
seasonal_promos.holiday: Holiday Stress Relief — Gift certificate bundles (buy 3 get 1 free)
seasonal_promos.new_year: New Year Wellness — Monthly massage membership launch

client_psychology: Clients come for pain relief or stress management — both deeply personal motivations. They value a therapist who listens to their specific concerns and adjusts pressure accordingly. Many clients feel guilty about 'treating themselves' to massage — frame it as healthcare, not luxury. Membership models (monthly massage at a discount) create the stickiest recurring revenue. Referrals come from results — 'my neck pain is finally gone' drives more bookings than any ad.
